docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $492.12 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ALVEREZ, MARIA EUGENIA REYES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, OSCAR GARCIA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARIA EUGENIA REYES ALVEREZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARIA EUGENIA REYES ALVEREZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVEREZ, MARIA EUGENIA REYES $295.12 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $440.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
